question: When did NASA announce astronauts Sunita Williams and Barry Wilmore would return to Earth?
answer: NASA announced on August 24 that astronauts Sunita Williams and Barry Wilmore would return in February 2025.
keypoints: NASA announces on August 24 that astronauts Williams and Wilmore will not return until February 2025.

question: Which company was assigned to return the astronauts to Earth due to thruster problems?
answer: SpaceX was tasked with bringing the astronauts home because of the thruster issues.
keypoints: SpaceX is tasked with bringing the astronauts home due to the thruster issues.
